transcript_preview: 1.22. Klausies Lasi. José ir no Kubas. José nav Latvijas pilsonis. Pašreiz viņš studē Latvijā. Viņš ir dzimis 1992. gada 31. janvārī. Viņš nav precējies. Viņš studē reizeknē kopš 2014. gada. Viņš būs dizainers. Viņš runās spāniski, angliski
translation_preview: Listen to Lasi. José is from Cuba. José is not a citizen of Latvia. He is currently studying in Latvia. He was born on 31 January 1992. He's not married. He has been studying at a time since 2014. He'll be a designer. He will speak Spanish,
